auth.signInPrompt: Sign in to your Kasa account
auth.2faPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or use a backup code.
auth.enter2faCode: Enter your 6-digit code or a backup code.
welcome.hero.title: Family-centered membership management
welcome.hero.subtitle: Track families, dues, lifecycle events, statements, and payments in one calm, modern workspace. Built for small communities that want clarity without complexity.
welcome.earlyAccess: Kasa is invitation-only while we're in early access.
welcome.cta.title: Ready to take Kasa for a spin?
welcome.cta.subtitle: Tell us a little about yourself and we'll send you an invitation.
welcome.feature.multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant by design
welcome.feature.multiTenant.body: Each workspace is fully isolated. Your data never crosses organizational lines.
welcome.feature.payments.title: Payments + recurring billing
welcome.feature.payments.body: Charge saved cards, run monthly cycles, and email PDF statements without leaving the app.
welcome.feature.lifecycle.title: Lifecycle events
welcome.feature.lifecycle.body: Births, bar mitzvahs, weddings — track the moments that matter alongside the numbers.
welcome.feature.reports.title: Calendar-aware reports
welcome.feature.reports.body: Yearly P&L, cycle balances, and per-family histories computed on demand.
welcome.feature.roles.title: Role-based access
welcome.feature.roles.body: Owners, admins, and members each get exactly the permissions they need.
welcome.feature.security.title: Secure by default
welcome.feature.security.body: Encrypted secrets at rest, rate-limited auth, CSRF protection, and audited mutations.
signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Get started with Kasa — you'll get your own private workspace.
signup.reason.missingCode: Signing up is invitation-only. Please use the link from your invitation email.
signup.reason.notFound: This invitation code is not recognized. Please use the link from your invitation email.
signup.reason.used: This invitation has already been used. If you already created an account, please sign in.
signup.reason.expired: This invitation has expired. Please request a new one.
signup.reason.error: We couldn't validate your invitation. Please try again later.
signup.emailHint: This is the email your invitation was sent to.
signup.autoLoginFailed: Account created but auto-login failed. Please log in manually.
signup.validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
signup.validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
invite.title: You're invited
invite.wrongUserSuffix: Please sign out and use the correct account.
invite.namePasswordRequired: Name and a password of at least 8 characters are required
requestInvite.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself. We'll get back to you with an invitation link.
requestInvite.thanksBody: If we approve your request, you'll receive an email with a link to finish creating your account.
requestInvite.messageHint: What community are you with? How will you use Kasa?
requestInvite.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
requestInvite.validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
pricing.hero.title: Simple pricing for every kehilla
pricing.hero.subtitle: Choose a platform plan for your organization. Member card charges and statements are included — you only pay Kasa for the workspace capacity you need.
common.name: Name
family.title: Family
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back — here's your workspace at a glance.
dashboard.tasksLoadErrorDesc: Check your connection and try again.
dashboard.noTasksAll: Create a task to track follow-ups, deadlines, and reminders.
dashboard.noTasksFiltered: Try switching the filter or create a new task.
dashboard.firstRunSubtitle: Let's get you set up in three quick steps.
dashboard.error.loadTasks: Could not load tasks. Pull to refresh or try again.
dashboard.statsLoadErrorDesc: Check your connection and try again.
dashboard.memberSubtitle: You have view-only access. Browse your organization's families below.
dashboard.member.viewMembers: View family members and contact info
dashboard.tooltip.balance: Cash received minus lifecycle expenses for the current cycle.
dashboard.tooltip.paymentsReceived: Total payments recorded this cycle, net of refunds.
families.subtitle: Manage family members and their information.
families.noFamiliesDesc: Create your first family to start tracking payments and members.
families.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, phone, address, plan…
families.selectAll: Select all matching the current filter (capped at 500)
families.deleteMessage: This permanently deletes {name} and all of their data.
families.bulkDeleteMessage: They will be moved to the recycle bin and can be restored within 30 days.
families.bulkPlanDesc: Assign a payment plan to all selected families. Choose "No plan" to clear the assignment.
families.bulkSelectionCap: Selection capped at {cap} families. Run bulk actions in batches to cover the rest.
families.error.loadExport: Could not load all families for export.
families.error.missingPlan: Family is missing a payment plan. Please update the family.
families.error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
families.form.emailOptOut: Opt out of bulk statement emails
families.form.emailOptOutDesc: Skip this family in "Send via Email" jobs and the monthly auto-email cron. Ad-hoc per-family sends from the family page are unaffected.
onboarding.zeroStepsSubtitle: Let's get your organization set up in five quick steps.
